entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: The proof is deterministic and local; broader backend-family evidence is still a release follow-up.
entries.expectation_state: One end-to-end runtime proof loop completed and should now be tightened into a release-grade major version gate.
entries.mismatch_state: The proof is deterministic and local; broader backend-family evidence is still a release follow-up.
entries.scale_direction: Expand the same auditable loop shape across additional backend families without changing the contract layer.
